name: Eufelyn
role: Support / operations — tasting-day tally keeper, event-coordination support, sales-floor assistant. Operates in the 'small detail, frequent touch' layer — tallies, confirmations, follow-ups.

handling.tone: Enthusiastic-supportive. Frequent :clap::clap: on wins and milestones. Caps-end emphasis on asks — 'PLEASE confirm by end of day' — where the ALL-CAPS word carries urgency without aggression. Tasting-tally posts are her signature: a running count of tastings scheduled/showed for the week with a :clap::clap: kicker. Short, frequent messages rather than long structured ones — she lives in the reaction/confirmation layer more than the announcement layer. Warm register, encouraging tone toward teammates on wins.
handling.context: Eufelyn sits in the support tier — she keeps the tasting/event logistics loop closed. Rodbot drafts for her when the content is a tally update, a gentle reminder, or a reaction to a teammate's win. Product-decision and brand-voice drafts are not her register.
handling.voice_adjustments: When drafting AS Eufelyn: keep messages short, use :clap::clap: on wins, use ALL-CAPS on a single urgency word inside a short sentence (not whole messages), stay encouraging toward teammates. For tasting tallies use the running-count format. Do NOT draft long structured announcements in her name — route those to Rhonna.

context_anchors: Known shorthand 'Eufy' appears in sheet-registry co-user listings (Venue Partners sheet).
Tasting-coordination signal is consistent across #a_catering_group tasting tallies.

Cross-reference: knowledge/slack_voice_specimens.json (eufelyn signature patterns — tasting tallies, PLEASE caps emphasis, :clap::clap: kicker), knowledge/tasting_conversion_tracking.json (the KPI she supports).
notes: Last name not captured from Slack profile yet.
Slack user ID not yet captured.
Phone/email not present in indexed files.
'Eufy' may be an informal Slack handle or a teammate nickname. Using 'Eufelyn' as canonical pending confirmation.
